title: Minimax Code + M3 : Crazy Alternative to Claude,Codex!
summary: MiniMax M3 is an open-weights AI model designed for coding agents, tool use, and long-context tasks, supporting up to one-million-token context windows. It offers both Anthropic-compatible and OpenAI-compatible API endpoints and can be used with coding tools like Cursor, Cline, and RooCode. MiniMax Code is an accompanying IDE platform featuring Agent Team collaboration features and native multimodal support for image and video input.
writeup: The video covers MiniMax M3, an open-weights model built for coding agents, tool use, and long-context work with context windows up to one million tokens, alongside MiniMax Code, an accompanying IDE platform. It matters because M3 exposes both Anthropic-compatible and OpenAI-compatible API endpoints, letting it slot into existing coding tools like Cursor, Cline, and RooCode as a substitute for Claude and Codex. Key takeaways: the model targets agentic coding and tool calling, MiniMax Code adds Agent Team collaboration features, and the platform supports native multimodal input for images and video.
